title: No Trades?! My Gold EA Is Waiting… Here’s Why
author: Loose-Object-8913
selftext:
Small update on the gold EA.



I uploaded a video showing why it hasn’t taken any trades this week.



Basically gold has been pretty neutral on H4, so it’s just waiting instead of forcing entries.



That was one of the biggest lessons while building it — doing nothing is sometimes the best decision.



Video here if anyone wants the full breakdown:

[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D6lC2rcB\_I8](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D6lC2rcB_I8)
